title: chrysolaena lithospermifolia
intro: Chrysolaena lithospermifolia, also known as the shrub verbena, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The extracts of Chrysolaena lithospermifolia have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of coughs, sore throats, and other respiratory problems, as well as provide protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Chrysolaena lithospermifolia is often used as an infusion or tincture, and it can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
